pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting task setup scripts (setup_task.sh) and export scripts (export_result.sh) which explicitly monitor and clean up this specific path.
Verified by inspecting task setup scripts (setup_task.sh) and export scripts (export_result.sh) which explicitly monitor and clean up this specific path.
Verified by checking the environment setup script (install_gvsig.sh) which downloads the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip' dataset from naturalearthdata.com.
Verified by downloading the actual shapefile and inspecting its DBF attribute table fields using pyshp.

Verified by reading the DBF records from the shapefile; found 8 unique values for the CONTINENT field ('Africa', 'Antarctica', 'Asia', 'Europe', 'North America', 'Oceania', 'South America', 'Seven seas (open ocean)'), which satisfies the claimed minimum of 5.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real, non-synthetic 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' shapefile from the Natural Earth dataset. Inspection of the shapefile's attribute table confirms it contains a 'CONTINENT' field with 8 distinct categories. The required output paths for the gvSIG project file (/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/continent_categories.gvsproj) and the exported map image (/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/continent_map.png) exactly match the paths expected by the environment's evaluation scripts.
